title: Spicy Ethiopian Stir Fry
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry from the heart of Ethiopia. This dish combines the perfect blend of creamy, spicy, and savory flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Ethiopian spice blend and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the mixed vegetables and sauté for 3-4 minutes.
Add the canned tomatoes and stir well.
Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh cilantro (optional)
